services.headline: Comprehensive Environmental Solutions
services.subtitle: From underground tanks to emergency spills, we handle every environmental challenge with precision and care.

cards.title: Oil Tank Removal & Installation
cards.description: Expert underground and aboveground storage tank services — removal, installation, abandonment, and full regulatory compliance for your property.

cards.title: 24/7 Emergency Spill Response
cards.description: Round-the-clock rapid response for oil spills and hazardous material incidents. We contain and clean up fast to minimize damage.

cards.title: Mold & Water Damage Remediation
cards.description: Professional mold testing, safe removal, and complete water damage restoration to protect your family's health and property value.

cards.title: Geoprobe & Sonic Drilling
cards.description: Advanced soil and groundwater sampling, monitoring well installation, and subsurface investigations using cutting-edge drilling technology.

cards.title: Cesspool & Septic Services
cards.description: Full-service cesspool and septic system maintenance, repair, and installation. Keep your drainage systems flowing properly year-round.

cards.title: Hazardous Waste Transport
cards.description: Licensed Part 364 permitted hazardous waste transportation ensuring safe, compliant disposal that meets all NYS regulations.

how_it_works.headline: How We Solve Your Environmental Problem

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: Call us anytime — we assess your situation, explain your options clearly, and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees.

steps.title: Expert Execution
steps.description: Our experienced crews arrive on schedule with specialized equipment, handling every detail from permits to project completion.

steps.title: Certified & Complete
steps.description: You receive full documentation, compliance certificates, and the confidence that your property is safe and protected.

about.label: About Eastern Environmental
about.headline: New York's Most Diverse Environmental Contracting Firm
about.description: Since 2001, Eastern Environmental Solutions has been the region's go-to partner for complex environmental projects. Our project management team brings over 100 combined years of industry experience, earning the trust of major organizations like Northrop Grumman and Brookhaven National Laboratory. We've been voted the Platinum Award winner for Best Environmental Services three years running by local consumers.

features.title: Full-Service 24/7 Operations
features.description: Round-the-clock environmental contracting and remediation services — we never close when you need us most.

features.title: NYS Part 364 Permitted
features.description: Fully licensed waste transporter with Part 364 permit from New York State for safe, compliant hazardous waste handling.

features.title: Platinum Award Winner
features.description: Voted best Environmental Services three consecutive years by local consumers — a testament to our quality and reliability.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed, upfront quotes so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to You
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project with full documentation, regulatory compliance certificates, and responsive follow-up. If any issue arises after completion, our team is just one call away — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an environmental emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer true 24/7 emergency response. Our crews are dispatched immediately and typically arrive on-site within hours, depending on your location across Long Island, NYC, or New Jersey.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit to remove my underground oil tank?
faqs.answer: Yes, tank removals require permits from your local municipality. We handle all permitting, inspections, and compliance documentation as part of our full-service approach — you don't have to worry about any of the paperwork.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Long Island (Nassau and Suffolk Counties), New York City (Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx), and parts of New Jersey. Our fleet and crews are positioned to reach you quickly.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured for hazardous waste work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold a Part 364 Waste Transporter Permit from New York State and are fully licensed and insured for all environmental contracting services we provide.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a mold problem?
faqs.answer: Common signs include musty odors, visible discoloration on walls or ceilings, and respiratory issues. We offer professional mold testing to identify the type and extent of any contamination, then provide a remediation plan.

testimonials.name: Tim
testimonials.text: Outstanding service! Scott was a pleasure to work with and handled our underground oil tank situation with professionalism and tact. Would highly recommend for commercial building needs.
testimonials.context: Valley Stream, NY - Oil Tank Services

testimonials.name: Joy
testimonials.text: This company was amazing! I had no idea who to call when I had a problem with my cesspool. Every person I had to deal with was awesome.

testimonials.name: Leslie
testimonials.text: Eastern Environmental fit me into their schedule immediately. The crew and their awesome truck were punctual and extremely thorough.
